## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create pagination controls (prev/next/jump) with keyboard support
- Build filter chips with removable tags and count badges
- Wire to mock datasets in lists/tables
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Controls min 36px (pointer) / 44px (touch)
  - Badges readable at 12–14px; contrast AA
  - Clear-all control always visible when filters active

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Pagination reusable and accessible
- [ ] Filter chips with badges and removal
- [ ] Integrated into at least 2 list views
- [ ] PR includes screenshots of active/inactive states

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `components`, `filters`, `priority-medium`
